spirit:component.spirit:name: gtyp_axi_noc_1_0

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: CONNECTIONS
spirit:parameter.spirit:value: MC_3 {read_bw {100} write_bw {100} read_avg_burst {4} write_avg_burst {4}} M03_AXI {read_bw {5} write_bw {5}}

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: CONNECTIONS
spirit:parameter.spirit:value: MC_2 {read_bw {100} write_bw {100} read_avg_burst {4} write_avg_burst {4}} M00_AXI {read_bw {5} write_bw {5}} M01_AXI {read_bw {5} write_bw {5}} M02_AXI {read_bw {5} write_bw {5}}

spirit:component.spirit:description: The Versal AXI NOC IP connects AXI memory-mapped devices through the Network On Chip and hard DDR memory controller

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: NUM_HBM_BLI
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: Number of HBM AXI PL Slave Interfaces

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: SI_SIDEBAND_PINS
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: Slave Interface AXI Parity Sideband Signals

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: MI_SIDEBAND_PINS
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: Master Interface AXI Parity Sideband Pins

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: HBM_SIDEBAND_PINS
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: Slave Interface AXI Parity Sideband Signals for HBM/BLI NMU
